---
title: 'MetaSapiens: Real-Time Neural Rendering with Efficiency-Aware Pruning and
  Accelerated Foveated Rendering'
author:
- Weikai Lin
- Yu Feng
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
- human_perception
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/asplos25.pdf
talk_source: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1z_GqK0imMH_fR48RaC76mAfAEnk5CgS2cuEwgBlbmsI/edit?usp=sharing
website_source: https://horizon-lab.org/metasapiens/
journ: ASPLOS
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
award: Best Paper Award
pub_number: 91
---
